debug_info.goal:
case right.right
p : ℕ
h : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∃ m, p = 4 * m + 1 → {s | s ^ 2 = -1}.card = 0

proof:
refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp'
      have : (p : ℕ) = 1 := by
        simpa [Nat.mul_zero, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hp'
      have hpprime : Nat.Prime p := h.out
      have hpne : p ≠ 1 := by exact hpprime.ne_one
      exact (hpne this).elim
failed_attempts:
refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp
      have : False := by
        have h2 : 2 ∣ p := by
          refine ⟨2 * 0, ?_⟩
          simpa [hp, two_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
            mul_comm]
        have hp2 : p = 2 := (h.out.eq_of_dvd_of_dvd (Nat.Prime.two_dvd_iff.mp h2)
          (Nat.dvd_refl p)).symm
        have : (4 * 0 + 1 : ℕ) = 1 := by simp
        have : p = 1 := by simpa [hp2] using congrArg id (by simpa [hp] using this)
        exact Nat.ne_of_gt h.out.one_lt this
      exact (this.elim)

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp4
      have : (2:ℕ) ∣ p := by
        refine ⟨2 * 0, ?_⟩
        simpa [hp4, mul_add, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
          mul_comm]
      have hp2 : p = 2 := (Nat.Prime.eq_two_or_odd (h := h.out)).resolve_right (by
        intro hpodd
        exact hpodd.not_even this)
      exfalso
      exact Nat.succ_ne_self 0 (by simpa [hp2] using hp4)

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp4
      have : (2:ℕ) ∣ p := by
        refine dvd_of_modEq ?_
        simpa [Nat.ModEq] using congrArg (fun n => n % 2) hp4
      have hp2 : p = 2 := by
        exact (Nat.Prime.eq_two_of_dvd_natPrime (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p) this).symm
      have : False := by exact (Nat.succ_ne_self 1) (by simpa [hp2] using hp4)
      exact (this.elim)

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp
      have : (0 : ℕ) = 2 := by
        have : p = 1 := by
          simpa [hp, Nat.mul_zero] using this
        have hp2 : p = 2 := (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p).eq_two_or_odd.resolve_right (by simpa [this])
        exact (Nat.one_ne_two (by simpa [hp2] using this)).elim
      exact this.elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp4
      have : False := by
        have hp2 : p = 2 := by omega
        exact (by omega : (2:ℕ) = 1)
      exact (this.elim)

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp
      have : p = 1 := by
        linarith
      have := (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p).ne_one
      exact (this this).elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp
      have : p = 1 := by nlinarith
      have hp' : False := by
        have : p.Prime := h.out
        exact (this.ne_one this).elim
      exact (hp'.elim)

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp
      exfalso
      have hp2 : p = 1 := by
        nlinarith
      have : (p : ℕ) ≠ 1 := (Nat.Prime.ne_one (h := h.out))
      exact this hp2
successful_attempts:
refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp'
      have : (p : ℕ) = 1 := by
        simpa [Nat.mul_zero, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hp'
      have hpprime : Nat.Prime p := h.out
      have hpne : p ≠ 1 := by exact hpprime.ne_one
      exact (hpne this).elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp4
      have : p = 1 := by
        nlinarith
      have hp1 : p ≠ 1 := by
        exact (Nat.Prime.ne_one (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p))
      exact (hp1 this).elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp4
      have : p = 1 := by
        simpa [hp4]
      have hp' : Nat.Prime 1 := by
        simpa [this] using (h.out)
      exact (hp'.ne_one rfl).elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp4
      have : False := by
        have hp2 : p = 1 := by
          nlinarith [hp4]
        have hpprime : Nat.Prime p := (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p)
        exact (hpprime.ne_one hp2).elim
      exact (this.elim)

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp4
      have : (p = 1) := by
        nlinarith [hp4]
      have hp' : p ≠ 1 := by
        exact Nat.Prime.ne_one (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p)
      exact (hp' this).elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp'
      exfalso
      have : p = 1 := by
        nlinarith [hp']
      have hpprime : Nat.Prime p := h.out
      exact hpprime.ne_one this

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp
      exfalso
      have hp' : p = 1 := by simpa [hp] using hp
      exact (h.out.ne_one hp').elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp4
      exfalso
      have : p = 1 := by simpa [hp4]
      exact (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p).ne_one this

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp1
      have : p = 1 := by
        nlinarith [hp1]
      have hp' : p.Prime := h.out
      exfalso
      exact hp'.ne_one this

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp
      have : False := by
        have hp1 : p = 1 := by simpa using hp
        exact (h.out.ne_one hp1)
      exact (this.elim)

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro hp4
      exfalso
      have hp' : p = 1 := by
        simpa [Nat.mul_zero, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hp4
      have : Nat.Prime 1 := by simpa [hp'] using (h.out)
      exact this.ne_one rfl
